programme.title: The Boarding School Murders
programme.desc: (M) Frankie leaves foster care for an exclusive Swiss boarding school, but the opportunity has a deadly price. When a classmate is murdered, Frankie must fight to uncover the secret.

programme.title: Her Deadly Night In Paris
programme.desc: (M) An American exchange student in Paris falls for her host family's son. But when she witnesses a murder, it sets off a chain of events that changes their lives forever.

programme.title: A Model Murder
programme.desc: (M) When model Kara gets disturbing messages from a fan, cyber influencer Cody comes to her aid. But when the stalker begins to show up in person, 'IRL' takes on a whole new meaning.

programme.title: Bad Tutor
programme.desc: LMN provides drama movies, thrillers, and suspense-filled stories focused on relationships, crime, and real-life inspired events.
